channel.title: Jamaica on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Jamaica on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Cousin Leroy's Jamaica Update – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Cousin Leroy in the Bronx reads the Jamaica news and has some thoughts.

item.title: The Yard Report – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Dispatches from Kingston — gas going up, hurricane victims still in schools, and Jamaica not in the World Cup. A normal week.

item.title: Cousin Leroy's Jamaica Dispatch – April 8, 2026
item.description: Cousin Leroy in the Bronx shares his extremely confident take on Jamaica news. Economy, shelters, and why he still thinks JA is the greatest.

item.title: The Yard Report – April 8, 2026
item.description: Kingston's sardonic take on Jamaica's minus-one-percent growth, students exposed to sex in school shelters, and a JDF soldier charged with murder.
